'''Endex''' was a [[Planet/Legends|world]] of rocky canyons. It was the [[Entymal]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. During the time of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]], the Entymals were renowned as excellent [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. For centuries, many pilots were trained in the canyons which left a lot of wreckage behind.<ref name="The Endex Daredevils">{{TORcite|type=crewskill|Archaeology|The Endex Daredevils}}</ref>

After the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]], however, the planet was subjugated and the Entymals were enslaved. This [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]] and rule was continued by first the [[Pentastar Alignment]], and then the [[Imperial Remnant]].
